title: Neural Traffic Counter
description: YOLO-based system that detects and counts vehicles in real time from roadside cameras.

title: Emotion Classification Engine
description: NLP model that analyzes text sentiment and emotional tone for social media analytics.

description: Time-series forecasting model that predicts local temperature and precipitation trends.

title: Remote Excavator Controller
